Sophie Laurent
Managing Editor, New York, NY
sophie.laurent@example.com | 555-201-3007 | linkedin.com/in/sophie-laurent

SUMMARY
Managing editor with 8 years in digital and print publishing, leading editorial
teams, shaping content strategy, and growing audience engagement. Hands-on
editor and copywriter with a strong command of AP style and CMS workflows.

EXPERIENCE
Managing Editor — Lattice Media (2020–present)
- Lead a team of six writers and editors; own the editorial calendar, story
  assignment, and final copy editing for a lifestyle publication reaching 4M
  monthly readers.
- Set content strategy that grew organic audience engagement 45% through SEO
  content, newsletters, and refreshed editorial standards.
- Edit and fact-check features, manage the CMS publishing workflow, and uphold
  AP style and house voice across all content.

Staff Writer / Copy Editor — City Pulse Magazine (2016–2020)
- Wrote and edited feature articles, headlines, and copy; proofread print issues
  and contributed to digital content production.

SKILLS
Editorial, editing, copy editing, writing, copywriting, content strategy, CMS,
AP style, proofreading, storytelling, publishing, journalism, audience
engagement, newsletters, headlines, content marketing

EDUCATION
B.A. Journalism, New York University, 2016
